task_completion.description: Agent opens and reads the process description text file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal window is visible displaying the contents of '~/Desktop/process_description.txt'.

task_completion.description: Agent adds standard engineering symbols for the required equipment to the draw.io canvas.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The draw.io canvas contains at least 5 distinct shapes representing a Feed Compressor, Pre-heater, Catalytic Reactor, Cooler/Condenser, and High-Pressure Separator.

task_completion.description: Agent connects the equipment shapes in the correct sequence.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Directional arrows connect the equipment shapes in the sequence: Compressor → Pre-heater → Reactor → Cooler/Condenser → Separator.

task_completion.description: Agent adds a recycle loop from the separator back to the start.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An arrow originates from the High-Pressure Separator (typically the top) and connects back to the beginning of the process (e.g., the Feed Compressor or the initial feed stream).

task_completion.description: Agent labels the process streams with the required text.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Text labels including 'N2+H2 Feed', 'Liquid NH3', and 'Recycle Gas' are visible on or adjacent to the appropriate connecting arrows in the diagram.

task_completion.description: Agent saves the diagram as a .drawio file and exports it as a .png file to the Desktop.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Save/Export dialogs showing the filenames 'haber_process.drawio' and 'haber_process.png' directed to the Desktop, or the file icons appearing on the Desktop background/file manager.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent used the draw.io graphical interface to create the diagram.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent dragging and dropping shapes from the draw.io sidebar and using the GUI tools, rather than writing XML code in a text editor or terminal.

integrity.description: Verify that the PNG file was exported using draw.io's built-in export functionality.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent navigating the draw.io menu (e.g., File -> Export as -> PNG) rather than using terminal commands to mock or convert the file.

integrity.description: Verify that the diagram was constructed incrementally.
integrity.visual_evidence: The sequence of screenshots should show the diagram being built shape by shape and connection by connection, rather than a completed diagram being pasted or loaded all at once from an external source.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating a Haber-Bosch Process Flow Diagram in draw.io. The diagram must contain at least 5 main equipment shapes (Compressor, Pre-heater, Reactor, Cooler/Condenser, Separator) and at least 6 connecting edges. The sequence is Compressor → Pre-heater → Reactor → Cooler/Condenser → Separator. A recycle loop must connect the Separator back to the Compressor/start. Required stream labels include 'N2+H2 Feed', 'Liquid NH3', and 'Recycle Gas'. The final outputs must be saved as 'haber_process.drawio' and 'haber_process.png' on the Desktop.
